Waiting... (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,124,543Details
International Box Office $2,548,731
Worldwide Box Office $18,673,274
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $39,846,872
Total $39,846,872
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,021,106 (37.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.68 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:86.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$1,125,000 (worldwide box office is 16.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,652 opening theaters/1,652 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $30,085,727

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 7th, 2005 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: February 7th, 2006 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment, released as Waiting
MPA Rating: R for strong crude and sexual humor, pervasive language and some drug use.
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Waiting
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble
Plot point: Food, Relationships Gone Wrong, Restaurants
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
